articles.title: Anna’s Taqueria opens in South Boston with $3.50 super burritos
articles.description:
The local chain’s newest location opens Tuesday on West Broadway.

The post Anna’s Taqueria opens in South Boston with $3.50 super burritos appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Anna's Taqueria opens its newest location on West Broadway in South Boston.
Super burritos priced at $3.50 are now available for local residents.
The opening provides more affordable dining options for the South Boston community.

articles.title: Police chase dump truck stolen out of Mass. that eventually crashes behind a Maine school
articles.description:
The dump truck, driven by a Marlborough resident, crashed into a playground fence in Lewiston, Maine, police say.

The post Police chase dump truck stolen out of Mass. that eventually crashes behind a Maine school appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Marlborough resident drove a stolen dump truck from Massachusetts, leading to a police chase.
The truck crashed into a playground fence at a school in Lewiston, Maine.
No injuries reported, but the incident raises safety concerns for Boston-area residents.

articles.title: Cambridge Friends School to close after 65 years
articles.description:
Enrollment has fallen below 50 students as the private nonprofit prepares to shut its doors in 2027.

The post Cambridge Friends School to close after 65 years appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Cambridge Friends School will close in 2027 after 65 years of operation.
Enrollment has dropped to below 50 students, prompting the closure decision.
Local families will lose a longstanding educational option in the Cambridge area.

articles.title: Years after his U.S. soccer rant, Taylor Twellman returned to ESPN to make a World Cup prediction
articles.description:
"I think it's quarterfinals or bust."

The post Years after his U.S. soccer rant, Taylor Twellman returned to ESPN to make a World Cup prediction appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Taylor Twellman predicts U.S. soccer team will reach at least the quarterfinals in World Cup.
Twellman, a Boston native, returned to ESPN to share his insights on May 26, 2026.
His prediction may energize local soccer fans ahead of the World Cup.

articles.title: Rideshare drivers in Massachusetts formally unionize
articles.description:
The App Drivers Union said it was the first organization in the country to be formally certified to represent drivers for apps such as Uber and Lyft.

The post Rideshare drivers in Massachusetts formally unionize appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Massachusetts rideshare drivers officially unionize, becoming the first in the nation to do so.
The App Drivers Union will represent drivers for Uber and Lyft across the state.
This unionization may improve working conditions and benefits for Boston's rideshare drivers.

articles.title: Barney Frank’s memorial service will be at Faneuil Hall
articles.description:
Frank served in Congress for 32 years. He died at the age of 86 earlier this month.

The post Barney Frank’s memorial service will be at Faneuil Hall appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Barney Frank's memorial service will be held at Faneuil Hall.
Frank served in Congress for 32 years and passed away at 86.
The service honors his significant contributions to Boston and national politics.

articles.title: BPD releases photo of man accused of shoplifting from 3 separate stores
articles.description:
The male suspect is accused of stealing sunglasses from a Macy's and Sunglass Hut and cologne from a CVS.

The post BPD releases photo of man accused of shoplifting from 3 separate stores appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: BPD released a photo of a man accused of shoplifting in Boston.
The suspect stole sunglasses from Macy's and Sunglass Hut, and cologne from CVS.
Residents are urged to report any sightings to assist in the investigation.

articles.title: Pearl Jam’s Eddie Vedder, other luminaries spotted at Boston Springsteen show
articles.description:
The Pearl Jam frontman seemed to be thoroughly enjoying himself at TD Garden Sunday.

The post Pearl Jam’s Eddie Vedder, other luminaries spotted at Boston Springsteen show appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Eddie Vedder attended Bruce Springsteen's concert at TD Garden on May 26.
The event attracted numerous local fans and celebrities, enhancing Boston's vibrant music scene.
Such high-profile appearances boost local business and tourism in the area.

articles.title: 21-year-old arrested for Dorchester shooting that injured one
articles.description:
The Boston man is facing multiple felony charges and pleaded not guilty, court records show.

The post 21-year-old arrested for Dorchester shooting that injured one appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: A 21-year-old man was arrested for a shooting in Dorchester that injured one person.
The suspect faces multiple felony charges and pleaded not guilty in court.
Residents are concerned about rising violence in the Dorchester area following this incident.

articles.title: This New England metro has an ‘emerging’ new luxury real estate market
articles.description:
“We are seeing a fundamental shift where luxury is moving."

The post This New England metro has an ‘emerging’ new luxury real estate market appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Portland, Maine's luxury real estate market is experiencing significant growth and demand.
Luxury home sales in Portland increased by 30% in the last year.
Boston residents may face increased competition for luxury properties in nearby markets.
